title: New zapier or old?
excerpt: My admin says they’re using the new zapier but it appears to be the same as the old one. I do not have access to their zap account. Here is an attached screenshot. I thought the new zapier released last month did not req…

posts.author: dfurt (Daniel Furtick)
posts.cookedHtml:
My admin says they’re using the new zapier but it appears to be the same as the old one. I do not have access to their zap account. Here is an attached screenshot. I thought the new zapier released last month did not require column value fields and json format?
I ask because we still have formatting issues with long text.

image (13)860×748 38.6 KB

This appears to be identical to the old zap.

Doesnt the new zap offer all of the available columns without manual input?
